commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
<template>
    <view class="login">
      <view class="bg">
        <view>
          <image src="/static/icons-title.png"></image>
        </view>
        <view style="margin-top: 24rpx">中油森智站级管理系统</view>
      </view>
      <view class="loginWay">
        <!-- open-type="getPhoneNumber" @getphonenumber="getPhoneNumber" -->
        <button class="phone" @click="getPhoneNumber">一键登录</button>
        <view class="sign" @click="goLogin">输入手机号码登录/注册</view>
      </view>
      <view class="license">
        <radio style="transform: scale(0.6)" color="#ED6B3E" :checked="licenseActive" @click="changeLicense" />
        <view>我已同意小程序</view>
        <view style="color: #ed6b3e">《服务协议》</view>
        <view>与</view>
        <view style="color: #ed6b3e">《隐私政策》</view>
      </view>
    </view>
  </template>
  
  <script>
  export default {
    data() {
      return {
        isPhone: false,
        token: "",
        isshow: false,
        nickname: "",
        infos: {
          avatarUrl: "",
          nickname: "",
        },
        licenseActive: false,
        phone: "",
        lat: "",
        lng: "",
      };
    },
    onShareAppMessage(options) {
      return {
        title: "登录",
        path: `/subpkg/login/index`,
      };
    },
    methods: {
      // 点击进入登录/注册页
      goLogin() {
        uni.navigateTo({
          url: "/subpkg/login/reg",
        });
      },
      // 切换协议状态
      changeLicense() {
        this.licenseActive = !this.licenseActive;
      },
      // 微信授权登录
      async getPhoneNumber() {
        if (!this.licenseActive) {
          uni.$common.showMsg("请勾选服务协议");
          return;
        } else {
          var [err, res] = await uni.login({
            provider: "weixin",
          });
          this.code = res.code;
          uni.$api
            .login({
              code: this.code,
              wechat: 1,
            })
            .then((res) => {
              uni.setStorageSync("info", res.data);
              uni.setStorageSync("infos", this.infos);
              if (res.code === 0) {
                uni.showToast({
                  icon: "none",
                  title: "登录成功",
                });
                uni.setStorageSync("token", "MT " + res.data.token);
                setTimeout(() => {
                  uni.reLaunch({
                    url: `/pages/index/index`,
                  });
                }, 1000);
              }
            })
            .catch((res) => {
              uni.showToast({
                icon: "none",
                title: res.data.msg,
              });
            });
        }
      },
    },
  };
  </script>
  
  <style lang="scss" scoped>
  .loginWay {
    letter-spacing: 3rpx;
    font-size: 28rpx;
    margin-top: 200rpx;
    .sign {
      width: 90%;
      height: 50px;
      background-color: #f3f4f6;
      border-radius: 20rpx;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 50px;
      margin: 15px auto 15px;
      font-size: 30rpx;
      color: #ff8400;
    }
    .visitor {
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 50px;
      margin: 15px auto 15px;
      font-size: 30rpx;
      color: #ff8400;
    }
    .phone {
      width: 90%;
      height: 50px;
      background-color: #ff8400;
      border-radius: 20rpx;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 50px;
      color: #fff;
      margin: 0 auto;
      font-size: 30rpx;
    }
  }
  .login-logo {
    width: 172px;
    margin: 30% auto 0;
    image {
      width: 100%;
    }
  }
  .bg {
    margin-top: 165rpx;
    font-size: 52rpx;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: monospace;
    margin-bottom: 110rpx;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .login {
    padding: 0 51rpx;
  }
  .btns {
    width: 60%;
    height: 30px;
    background-color: rgb(238, 62, 38);
    color: #fff;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 30px;
    border-radius: 5px;
    margin: auto;
    font-size: 14px;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20%;
  }
  ::v-deep .u-slide-up-enter-to {
    height: 200px !important;
  }
  .bg {
    image {
      width: 200rpx;
      height: 200rpx;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
  }
  .license {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 24rpx;
    line-height: 48rpx;
    margin-left: 26rpx;
    margin-top: 20rpx;
  }
  </style>
